scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -p '[{name}]' -n gateway,user,post,event,mobile -c blue,green,cyan,yellow,magenta "cd api-gateway && yarn dev" "cd ms-user && yarn dev" "cd ms-post && yarn dev" "cd ms-event && yarn dev" "cd nativapp && yarn dev"
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently -k -p '[{name}]' -n gateway,user,post,event -c blue,green,cyan,yellow "cd api-gateway && yarn dev" "cd ms-user && yarn dev" "cd ms-post && yarn dev" "cd ms-event && yarn dev"
scripts.dev:services: concurrently -k -p '[{name}]' -n user,post,event -c green,cyan,yellow "cd ms-user && yarn dev" "cd ms-post && yarn dev" "cd ms-event && yarn dev"
scripts.build: concurrently -p '[{name}]' -n gateway,user,post,event -c blue,green,cyan,yellow "cd api-gateway && yarn build" "cd ms-user && yarn build" "cd ms-post && yarn build" "cd ms-event && yarn build"
scripts.lint: concurrently -p '[{name}]' -n gateway,user,post,event -c blue,green,cyan,yellow "cd api-gateway && yarn lint" "cd ms-user && yarn lint" "cd ms-post && yarn lint" "cd ms-event && yarn lint"
scripts.test: concurrently -p '[{name}]' -n gateway,user,post,event -c blue,green,cyan,yellow "cd api-gateway && yarn test" "cd ms-user && yarn test" "cd ms-post && yarn test" "cd ms-event && yarn test"
